# Modern GPT {#sec-ch13-modern-gpt}

The previous chapters built a complete GPT from scratch.
Real production models add several refinements that improve efficiency, context length, and capability.
This chapter surveys the most important innovations beyond the baseline transformer.

{{< include book/13-modern-gpt/sections/rope.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-modern-gpt/sections/grouped-query-attention.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-modern-gpt/sections/flash-attention.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-modern-gpt/sections/alternative-architectures.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-modern-gpt/sections/takeaways.qmd >}}
